title: Senior Instructional Designer at WhiteHat Jr

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at WhiteHat Jr
jsonLd.description:
WhiteHat Jr, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WhiteHat Jr:
WhiteHat Jr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr!
